data.title: Port all Tech Hub hyperlinks, team bios, and missing sections to Campus page

data.body: Follow-up to FRAC-168: audit https://fractalbootcamp.com/fractal-tech-hub against /campus and add missing hyperlinks + sections. Specifically: Google Maps link on address, Flowglad links for $300/mo membership (https://app.flowglad.com/price/vrnt_G3G0SI2sWu0cdE0GBVxKE/purchase) and $40 day pass (https://app.flowglad.com/price/vrnt_19pxxXOzdUd3xiBVilFYB/purchase), 'regular events' link to Luma in body copy, McCarren Park PamPam map link (https://www.pampam.city/p/3hItQdj7pnuUtEkU4p7I), 'Contact Andrew' mailto (ajroberts0417@gmail.com), 'Fractal AI Accelerator' link (was 'Fractal Tech Bootcamp'). Missing sections: 'Build with us' team bios (Andrew Rose + Jake Zegil with twitter/github links), 'Mission Statement', Stripe billing link for membership management, 'What's Fractal?' footer section linking to fractalnyc.com + fractaluniversity.substack.com + merlin's place.
